class.name: CamelliaContext
class.brief_description: Camellia cipher context for custom decryptors.

method.name: finish
method.description: Releases context resources. Call this once you are done processing data. The context cannot be used again until you call [method start].

method.name: get_iv_state
method.description: Returns the current IV state of the context. This is meaningful only for [constant MODE_CBC_ENCRYPT], [constant MODE_CBC_DECRYPT], [constant MODE_CFB_ENCRYPT], and [constant MODE_CFB_DECRYPT], where the IV evolves with each [method update] call. Use it to resume streaming encryption across multiple buffers.

method.name: start
method.description: Initializes the cipher context with the given [param mode] and [param key]. The key must be 16, 24, or 32 bytes (Camellia-128, Camellia-192, or Camellia-256). An [param iv] of exactly 16 bytes is required for CBC and CFB modes and ignored for ECB modes. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success, or [code]ERR_ALREADY_IN_USE[/code] if [method finish] was not called after a previous [method start].

method.name: update
method.description: Processes [param src] through the cipher and returns the encrypted or decrypted output. [code]src.size()[/code] must be a multiple of 16 bytes. Call this once or multiple times after [method start].

constants.constant: Cipher Block Chaining mode - encrypt. Requires a 16-byte IV.
Cipher Block Chaining mode - decrypt. Requires a 16-byte IV.
Cipher Feedback mode - encrypt. Requires a 16-byte IV.
Cipher Feedback mode - decrypt. Requires a 16-byte IV.
Sentinel value equal to the number of modes. Not a valid mode.
